mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `food-system`.orders (number, status, user_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, user_name) VALUES (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{userName});
mapper.update: UPDATE `food-system`.orders SET status = 3, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM `food-system`.orders WHERE order_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count, CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN status = 1 THEN '待付款' WHEN status = 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN status = 3 THEN '已取消' WHEN status = 4 THEN '已取消' WHEN status = 5 THEN '已退款' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName FROM `food-system`.orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY status ASC

SELECT hours.hour AS hour, COALESCE(COUNT(o.id), 0) AS count FROM ( SELECT 0 AS hour UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 ) AS hours LEFT JOIN `food-system`.orders o ON HOUR(o.order_time) = hours.hour GROUP BY hours.hour ORDER BY hours.hour ASC
